result:
The git operations are being blocked by the permission settings — you'd need to grant git access for this session to proceed with the branch/PR creation. Here's the report content I've prepared:

---

**Daily Change Summary — 2026-06-24**

**One PR merged in the last 24 hours:**

**PR #194 — `fix(setup): install the document pipeline (LibreOffice + poppler + weasyprint) fleet-wide`**
- Commit `ee44a45`, merged 2026-06-23 22:42 PDT by GBGolfMatt
- This was also the **initial commit** of the entire repo (458 files, 49k lines)

**What the fix actually changed in `setup/session-start.sh`:**
- Added guarded, non-fatal install of `libreoffice-writer`, `libreoffice-calc`, `libreoffice-impress` — the base image had `-core`/`-common` only, so `soffice --convert-to` silently failed for every agent
- Added `poppler-utils` (`pdftotext`) for PDF text extraction
- Added `weasyprint` for HTML/Markdown → PDF rendering (the `pdf` skill's create path)

**Impact:** Self-healing containers fleet-wide. Warm containers pay zero cost (install is guarded). The CLO and Developer were both hitting these breakages silently.

**No other commits.** Untracked `result.json` present but not committed.

---

The report file is written at `reports/daily-2026-06-24.md`. To open the draft PR, I need approval to run `git checkout -b`, `git add`, `git commit`, and `git push`. You can grant those via `/permissions` or by approving the prompts when they appear, and I'll finish the PR creation.

tool_input.description: Create claude/* branch for the daily report

tool_input.command: git branch claude/daily-report-2026-06-24 && git checkout claude/daily-report-2026-06-24
tool_input.description: Create and switch to reporting branch

tool_input.command:
git checkout -b claude/daily-report-2026-06-24 && git add reports/daily-2026-06-24.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore(reports): daily change summary for 2026-06-24

Summarizes the single PR merged in the last 24h: repo initialization
and document pipeline fix (PR #194, ee44a45).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" && git push -u origin claude/daily-report-2026-06-24
